# Greenhouse Overview

Operational notes for the automated greenhouse controller.

## Startup

Power the controller and wait for the sensor bus to settle.

## Recovery

If a vent sticks, switch to manual mode and clear the obstruction.

- relates_to [[Greenhouse Control Loop]]
